source_jobs.title: Administrative Assistant
Engineer-In-Training/Planner, Transportation
Join the Team (Open Application)
source_jobs.description:
<p>Are you interested in joining our team of professionals and make a meaningful impact in communities? Urban Systems is always on the lookout for passionate and talented individuals to join our teams. Whether you're interested in future opportunities or simply want to express your general interest in working with us, we invite you to apply.&nbsp;<br><br>By submitting an application, you'll be considered for a variety of roles, current and future, that match your skills and aspirations.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>All resumes are reviewed by someone on our recruitment team. If you have individual needs or requirements and request assistance throughout the application process, please get in touch with our recruitment team by email at<span style="color: #236fa1;"> </span><a href="mailto:recruiting@urbansystems.ca"><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><span style="color: #236fa1; text-decoration: underline;"><span style="color: #ba372a; text-decoration: underline;">recruiting@urbansystems.ca</span></span></span></a> so we can better support you.</p>
<p>Urban Systems is an equal-opportunity employer. We strive to create an inclusive culture for all employees. Our clients come from all walks of life and so do you. We are looking for candidates with their own unique talents. If you don’t meet 100% of the preferred skills outlined in this job posting, tell us why you’d be a great fit for Urban Systems in your cover letter!&nbsp;</p></div>

source_jobs.title: Open Application for Students

notes: Urban Systems is an interdisciplinary consulting firm with a diverse range of job postings.
